khazana
Home Specs Tasks Getting Started

Tasks

Sprint 0

TaskStatusComplexityResult
Two-face atmosphere layer (data-face + atmosphere.css) verified complex Two-face atmosphere: Shell.astro SSR-stamps data-face on <html> (new face prop, defaults study); new atmosphere.css imported right after tokens.css gives Study no-op + Atlas cold blue-near-black delta (dark + light schemes), touching only atmosphere tokens. Reading-comfort invariants untouched in both faces (grep gate + browser computed-style audit). SSR verified via Container-API render harness spawned in isolated Node process. make serve dev target added.
Shared low-power/reduced-motion GL gates util verified simple Add 2 site test files for shared gl-gates util. Extraction pre-done; no refactor. gl-gates.test.ts = 16 direct unit tests (isLowPower/prefersReducedMotion/hasWebGL). gl-gates-consumers.test.ts = 6 source-scan guard tests. All green. Full site regression 90 files/1281 tests, full project 187 files/2286 tests, typecheck 0 errors.
Spine vocab + Provenance/Uncertainty schemas verified simple Added 6 World Data Spine vocab enums (LICENSE_TIERS, INDICATOR_FIELDS, WORLD_EVENT_CATEGORIES, EVENT_SEVERITIES, REFERENCE_RATERS, CADENCE_LANES) to packages/core/src/vocab.ts, each as const array + z.enum + inferred type. New packages/core/src/world-provenance.ts exports UncertaintySchema (5-variant discriminatedUnion on kind) + ProvenanceSchema closed with superRefine enforcing derived-only invariant. Wired export into index.ts. Extended vocab.test.ts (+6 tests) and added world-provenance.test.ts (11 tests). Documented 6 new vocabularies in CLAUDE.md canonical vocabularies section.
DeepState + ISW/CTP permission requests verified simple Docs-only. Verified official contact routes: DeepStateMap API/commercial data-use request form (https://api.deepstatemap.live/request) + license page (https://deepstatemap.live/license-en.html); ISW/CTP Fair Use and Attribution Policy (https://www.understandingwar.org/fair-use-and-attribution-policy), which explicitly requires prior written permission to incorporate ISW materials into datasets/mapping-platforms/analytic-products/systems and bars bulk/API/automated redistribution, permission email press@understandingwar.org. Wrote two source-specific ready-to-send request drafts + machine-readable pending tracker. Deliverable-2 unit verification PASS. Full regression PASS (185 files, 2264 tests). Deliverable-1 send is founder manual action: agent cannot submit web form or send email, so emails NOT actually sent — BLOCKED on founder send. Codex reviewer failed to output verdict (tooling). RESCOPED 2026-07-14 founder decision: emails deferred indefinitely, ship control-wikipedia tier; drafts kept in docs/cofounder/permission-requests/, revisit after real data evaluated. Send-emails deliverable removed from scope; remaining tracker deliverable passed.
Create private khazana-world-data repo + token wiring verified simple Founder unblocked prior run: private repo aether-auto/khazana-world-data now exists (private) and Actions secret WORLD_DATA_REPO_TOKEN set on aether-auto/khazana. Pushed the Spine scaffold (README + data/world-sources.json + data/world-sources.seed.json, both {version:1,sources:[]} + 5 tracked .gitkeep dirs under data/world/{countries,contracts,events,indicators,outlets}) straight to khazana-world-data main via gh-authed git (prior scaffold copy lived in a since-expired session scratchpad, so rebuilt it fresh from spec — content is deterministic, byte-identical in shape to what the spec demands). D1-D3 verified PASS. D4 (auth-smoke workflow dispatch) still pending: workflow file only exists on branch cofounder/sprint-0-world-data-private-repo, not on origin main, so the Actions API 404s on dispatch — task constraint forbids pushing main to origin, so this needs founder to merge the branch first. Worktree itself untouched (still at commit e20279f, nothing new to commit there). Full regression green.

Sprint 1

TaskStatusComplexityResult
AtlasShell, instrument rail, and /atlas route skeleton verified complex
world-government.ts schemas + vocab verified simple
India-states TopoJSON asset verified simple
Shared Methodology panel component verified simple
Indicator + CountryProfile schemas verified simple Added packages/core/src/world-indicator.ts (CountryCodeSchema, PeriodSchema, SubnationalRefSchema, IndicatorSchema, makeIndicatorId) and packages/core/src/world-country-profile.ts (IndicatorGroupSchema, SubnationalProfileSchema, CountryProfileSchema). Both re-exported from index.ts, colocated round-trip test files included. Two codex:review passes caught real deviations from design spec: normalizedScore was optional 0-1 instead of required 0-100; SubnationalRef/SubnationalProfile.level was free string instead of enum(state/district); makeIndicatorId used "-" placeholder instead of documented "" for absent subnationalCode. All three fixed, re-verified, final review clean.
Outlet/BiasProfile + WorldEvent/Reporting schemas verified simple world-outlet.ts (ReferenceRatingSchema, BiasProfileSchema, OutletSchema) + world-event.ts (ToneSchema, StanceSchema, ReportingSchema, WorldEventSchema) per spine design §3.4/§3.5, exported from index.ts. Round-trip + enum-coverage + rejection + derived-only-invariant tests. vocab enums + CLAUDE.md lines already satisfied by sprint-0 spine-provenance-schemas, verified not duplicated. Merged to main 671e634 with index.ts export-union conflict resolution.

Sprint 2

TaskStatusComplexityResult
world-bias-lab.ts derived-layer schemas verified simple Added packages/core/src/world-bias-lab.ts with all seven Bias Lab derived-layer schemas (DualAxisScore, WordfishPosition, NelaFeatureVector, CorroborationEdge, CorroboratedCoreClaim, DivergenceIndex, OutletStateAffiliation) matching spec §6.1's field names/types/bounds exactly, each embedding ProvenanceSchema/UncertaintySchema from world-provenance.ts. Re-exported from index.ts. Colocated world-bias-lab.test.ts covers round-trip fixtures for all seven schemas, numeric-bound rejection at edges, every enum literal (relation, computedFrom, affiliation) accept+reject, mixed corroboratedCore spectrumSpan preservation, missing-required-field rejection, affiliatedCountry optionality, and provenance-required rejection for the five schemas that actually carry a provenance field per spec.
Signature face-switch view transition verified complex Shipped signature cross-face view transition (two-faces spec §4, build step 3). face-switch.ts sets to-atlas/to-study VT type in pageswap + skipTransition on same-face full loads + TimeoutError observer + module-load focus landing + no-VT data-just-crossed fade (same-origin-only crossing gate). face-switch.css: direction-branched :active-view-transition-type() choreography (distinct keyframes/timings/origins), single face-mark shared element on wordmark (pseudo-animations default none, re-enabled only under typed crossings), explicit prefers-reduced-motion HARD gate, 200ms background-color fallback fade. Both shells wired: inline @view-transition + face-switch import. All deliverables + full 2399-test regression + codex approve.
Hand-authored archetype flow-template library verified simple Authored the 15-archetype GovArchetypeLibrary (all ~14 families from the design doc's §4.2, split military-junta from provisional per codex review) as committed TS data (scripts/government-archetypes-data.mts) plus a build/publish script (scripts/build-government-archetypes.mts) that writes it to the private world-data checkout path (.world-data/data/world/government-archetypes.json locally; real push to aether-auto/khazana-world-data when WORLD_DATA_REPO_TOKEN is set, which it is not in this environment). Added scripts/validate-government-archetypes.mts + .test.ts enforcing unique ids/slots, non-empty contents, declared-slot edges, no self-loops, generic (never country-specific) default-basis text, exact named-family coverage, and rejection of unrecognized fields on hand-edited JSON. All three deliverable verification commands pass against the real generated .world-data artifact.
indicator-to-range uncertainty adapter verified simple
PowerFlow diagram component + layout lib verified complex PowerFlow gov-structure MDX component shipped. Pure deterministic power-flow-layout.ts (branch COLUMNS via GOV_BRANCHES, tier ROWS via GOV_TIERS, content-fitted node boxes reusing wrapLabel, quadratic lane-bowed relation-preserving curves; reciprocal + cyclic edges get distinct opposite-side bows via canonical-perp + sign; unknown endpoints skipped). Thin PowerFlow.tsx renderer (responsive SVG, branch/tier labels, arrow markers userSpaceOnUse, canonical POWER_RELATIONS legend, keyboard+pointer incident-edge highlight) + PowerFlow.css (mobile hides SVG->fallback, reduced-motion). Structured no-JS SSR fallback: institution table grouped by branch/tier, system/executive/chamber/judiciary/federal/election facts, source-relation-target edge list w/ per-edge constitutionalBasis text+origin+sourceUrl, relation legend, provenance links for EVERY provenance-bearing group, ALL divergence notes (systemType + every fieldProvenance). Barrel re-exports component+props+layout types, no core-schema duplication. Barrel add forced generate allow-list parity: registered PowerFlow in KNOWN_COMPONENTS (validate.ts), CONTRACT_COMPONENTS + COMPONENT_METADATA (component-contract.ts, theater kit), and both writer component-catalog.json snapshots.
Contract + WorldSourceEntry/WorldRegistry schemas verified simple Added packages/core/src/world-contract.ts (ContractSchema, OCDS-aligned, status enum planned/active/complete/cancelled per spec §3.6) and packages/core/src/world-source.ts (WorldSourceEntrySchema, WorldRegistrySchema, parseWorldRegistry per spec §3.7), both importing CountryCodeSchema from world-indicator.ts, ProvenanceSchema from world-provenance.ts, LicenseTierSchema/CadenceLaneSchema/IndicatorFieldSchema from vocab.ts (no redefinition of CADENCE_LANES). Both re-exported from packages/core/src/index.ts. Two colocated test files added covering round-trip, optional-field, malformed-currency/negative-amount/unknown-status rejection, defaults-apply, and parseWorldRegistry valid/invalid cases.
world-theater.ts schemas verified simple
Worker /world/latest + /world/ingest endpoints verified simple Added GET /world/latest (public, reads world:latest, capped at 2000, newest-first by parsed WorldEvent.time) and PUT /world/ingest (fail-secure 503-before-401 WORLD_INGEST_TOKEN gate, WorldEventSchema-validated rollup envelope, preserves prior KV value on invalid input, canonicalizes+stores on success, 202). Extended Env with optional WORLD_INGEST_TOKEN, added PUT to CORS allow-methods, documented both routes plus wrangler secret provisioning in README/wrangler.toml. Headless Worker task, no make serve/browser verification applicable.

Sprint 3

TaskStatusComplexityResult
Persistent uncertainty strip component pending simple Uncertainty strip adapter + component built and verified. Exhaustive kind switch: CI direct bounds; SE mid ± 1.96·se per spec; raterSpread min/max/count; sampleSize/none produce no range datum. Component reuses layoutRangePlot/formatRangeValue. Rater-count now visible in ARIA label and text readout. All tests green (1354 site tests), typecheck 0 errors.
Inline cross-face moments + quiet variants verified simple CrossFaceLink tell + to-atlas-quiet/to-study-quiet transition ladder built, tested, browser-verified; already fully implemented and committed pre-session (9e8425c), this pass re-verified everything end to end.
Speculation Rules prerender on switch URLs pending simple warmup + fallback wired both faces, unit/integration/browser verify green, codex found one non-blocking P2 medium
Control-geometry fetchers across all postures verified simple Built control-geometry fetchers + permission-gating layer. All 4 deliverables verified: wikipedia fallback fetcher + tests, deepstate+isw licensed fetchers + registry + tests, resolver with 3-posture fallback chain + tests, full package integration. 20 new tests + 212 full suite tests pass. All deliverables emit schema-valid ControlLayer records; disabled sources excluded from active entry points while permission status=pending.
Theater registry, active.json, and membership pending complex Rebased 7c747ac theater membership onto fe1b7ef (geometry-layers main); reconciled conflicting files; 59 world-ingest tests pass (29 prior + 30 geometry), full regression 2606/2 pass; deliverables 2,3,4,6 verified; 1,5 blocked private repo 404; codex P2: ActiveTheater contract missing from core
Who-Funds-Whom schema design pass verified complex Added FundingRelationshipSchema to core packages; Option A binding choice implemented with 20 tests passing, 349 total core tests passing. All deliverables complete: decision document, schema implementation, integration tests, build guide. Codex review found medium-level finding about Senate LDA quarter granularity preservation.
packages/world-ingest package skeleton verified simple Skeleton package verified: source interfaces, registry I/O, HTTP re-exports in place. 4 deliverables pass. Regression tests all 210 files (2521 tests) pass. Codex approve.
Seed the world-source registry pending simple Validator + tests built; seed/live WorldRegistry seeded with 22 sources in private repo main; all deliverables pass validation (6 unit tests, seed registry zero violations, live registry zero violations + id-set match)
